description_long: This object consists of two side-by-side double-barrel shotguns, each featuring a wooden full stock and a metallic barrel assembly. The barrels are short and robust, with a matte metallic finish and visible break-action hinges at the breech. The stocks are made of polished wood, showing a natural grain pattern and ergonomic shaping for shoulder support. The trigger guards are rounded and enclose the double triggers, with a smooth metallic finish. The break-action mechanism is clearly visible, with one shotgun shown in an open position, exposing the twin barrels and breech. The overall design is compact, suitable for close-quarters use, and the materials suggest durability and traditional craftsmanship.
description: A pair of side-by-side double-barrel shotguns with wooden stocks and metallic barrels, featuring break-action mechanisms and rounded trigger guards. One shotgun is shown open, revealing the breech and twin barrels.
description_view_0: Side view showing both shotguns, one closed and one open, highlighting the wooden stocks and metallic barrels.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrels, showing the twin barrel openings and the symmetry of the side-by-side configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the break-action hinge and the open breech.
description_view_3: Rear view from above the stocks, showing the trigger guards, triggers, and the open breech of one shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels of equal length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
